actions_resetProgressConfirm.message: This will clear all tutorial completion status. You'll see first-visit prompts again.

empty_noTutorials.message: No tutorials available for this page.

empty_noTutorialsDescription.message: Tutorials will appear here when you navigate to pages that have guided tours.

prompt_description.message: Take a quick tour to learn the key features.

playground_basics_description.message: Learn how to select models and send your first message

playground_basics_modelContent.message: Select an AI model to chat with. Different models have different capabilities - look for tags like 'Vision' or 'Fast'. Star your favorites for quick access.

playground_basics_inputContent.message: Type your message here and press Enter to send. You can ask questions, request help with tasks, or have a conversation.

playground_basics_slashContent.message: Type / to see available commands. Try /search to find content in your knowledge base, or /web to search the internet.

playground_basics_promptContent.message: Select a system prompt to guide how the AI responds. You can create custom prompts in the Prompts workspace.

playground_basics_newChatContent.message: Click here to start a new conversation. Your previous chats are saved in the sidebar for easy access.

playground_tools_description.message: Discover knowledge search, file uploads, and advanced tools

playground_tools_toolsButtonContent.message: Access knowledge search, upload files, configure MCP tools, and more advanced features here.

playground_tools_knowledgeContent.message: Enable knowledge search to let the AI reference your ingested documents, notes, and media. Great for research and fact-checking.

playground_tools_webSearchContent.message: Toggle web search to let the AI search the internet for current information. Perfect for recent news or topics not in your knowledge base.

playground_tools_uploadContent.message: Upload images or documents to discuss them with the AI. Vision-capable models can analyze images directly.

playground_tools_ingestContent.message: Use Quick Ingest to add web pages, PDFs, or other content to your knowledge base for later reference.

playground_tools_mcpContent.message: MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools let the AI interact with external services and execute actions on your behalf.

playground_voice_description.message: Learn to use voice input and have spoken conversations

playground_voice_voiceChatContent.message: Start a hands-free voice conversation. Speak naturally and hear AI responses aloud.

playground_voice_dictationContent.message: Use dictation to speak your messages instead of typing. Great for longer inputs or when your hands are busy.

playground_voice_ttsContent.message: Click on any AI response to have it read aloud. Customize the voice and speed in Settings.

playground_voice_settingsContent.message: Configure voice chat settings including the voice model, auto-send timing, and trigger phrases.
